scripts.release:patch: pnpm version patch -m "release: v%s" && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:minor: pnpm version minor -m "release: v%s" && git push && git push --tags
scripts.release:major: pnpm version major -m "release: v%s" && git push && git push --tags
scripts.go: pnpm run release:patch && pnpm run pub
